title: rubus prehensibilis
intro: Rubus prehensilis, also known as the climbing raspberry or bearberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus prehensilis include its ability to help with digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune system function. Rubus prehensilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
